faqs.question: What is the selection criteria for admission at Vikrant University?
faqs.answer:
Vikrant University course admissions are based on entrance exam score or merit-based, as per the course requirement. Vikrant University course admission is subject to fulfilment of the admission criteria. The university provides a wide range of programmes across multiple specialisations. Admissions to the programmes offered at the university are primarily entrance-based. Students can check course-wise selection criteria below:
Course Name Selection Criteria
BTech Merit-based/JEE Main
BCA Merit-based
BA Merit-based
MBA Merit-based
MTech
Merit-based/GATE
PhD
VURAT + PI

faqs.question: What are the benefits of pursuing MBA from Vikrant University?
faqs.answer:
The MBA eligibility requires candidates to have completed their graduation in any field  (Science, Commerce,  Arts) with an aggregate of 50% or more. Students can also check the list of reasons below to pursue MBA course from Vikrant University:
Promising Career: The simplest approach to advance your career is to earn a Master of Business Administration. Students concentrate on the employment possibilities that follow earning a Master of Business Administration. MBA courses are becoming increasingly important to have managerial abilities and expertise as the globe becomes more and more competitive.
Develop Management Skills: Numerous Specialisations in Master of Business Administration enable students to concentrate on any specific area of business management. Each speciality aids students in developing a career in that particular industry. 
Entrepreneurship Abilities: Students learn about operating a business. For college students with a family company, this is particularly beneficial. The business will operate more efficiently and generate better returns thanks to the Master of Business Administration.

faqs.question: Is M.Tech available at Vikrant University?
faqs.answer: Yes, the M.Tech course is available at Vikrant University. Vikrant University offers a two-year M.Tech course divided into four semesters. To be eligible for the award of the degree, candidates shall complete the course in a maximum period of two years from the date of enrolment for the first semester of the course. Candidates must pass graduation or equivalent to apply for the M.Tech course.

college_info.intro: Vikrant University, Gwalior provides UG, PG, doctorate, diploma, integrated and certificate courses in engineering, computer applications and IT, legal studies, management and commerce, agricultural sciences, pharmacy, and others. BTech and MBA are the popular programmes offered at the university. Below-mentioned are Vikrant University popular programmes:

placements.overview: As per the 2024 placement stats, Vikrant University marked the highest pacakge of INR 18 LPA with a total placement of 426 students. The University provides placement assistance and facilitate the students with various programs and projects to provide industry-oriented experiences. Vikrant University has various global tie-ups and recruiters that facilitate internship and training opportunities. The University has around 20+ placement partnerships with academic associations with TimesPro, AWS, Internshala, Tally etc. Approved by NSDC, Vikrant University can officially provide training in partnership with NSDC. Some of the top recruiters of Vikrant University are Oracle, Snapdeal, Nagarro, Accenture, Make My Trip, PayTM etc.

student_insights.feedback: Students can work with faculty on research projects
Many students looking for better jobs
Students are expected to reach out to companies themselves
Strong alumni network that help with placement opportunities
Very Active and resourceful, college is also involved

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Vikrant University offers UG, PG, Doctorate, Diploma, Integrated and Certificate level courses in full-time mode. The University offers these courses through the School of Pharmacy, Engineering and Technology, Natural and Applied Science, Management and Commerce, Yoga and Naturopathy, Arts and Design, Vocational Studies and others. Vikrant University provides BTech, BSc, BPharma, MTech, PhD, MSc, LLB and various other courses. Therefore, candidates must secure a valid score in graduation, Class 12 and the respective entrance exams. Furthermore, the fee structure includes a tuition fees ranging from INR 10 K to INR 2.8 Lakh. reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Information Technology - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: Review of Vikrant University.

review_content.Placements: I don't remember the exact number, but a lot of students from my batch have got placed, and the average package is Rs. 2.5 Lacs per annum. The highest package is around 8 to 10 Lacs per annum, and the average package is around 2.5 Lacs per annum. A lot of companies come, like Gal India Pvt. Ltd. and VPS Pvt. Ltd., etc. Around 25 to 30% of students got placed in my batch. They offer many roles like fire safety engineer, IT engineer, consultant, system engineer, etc.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure here is good, and the faculty is also fine. They mingle well with the students and are not pressurized too much. The faculty here is such that their method of studying is very different, and they teach very well. Every year, events and organizations like tournaments are organized here, in which anyone from the city can take part and win a lot of prizes.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelors in Computer Application (BCA) - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: Yes, all are good for placement, and the overall experience is also good.

review_content.Placements: Placement is average. Those students who are good in our course and are placed in a company are the highest, approximately 10 Lacs. The lowest is 3 Lacs. For internships, 100% of students get an internship. Annual income is not good, but placement is good not any problem. If you are good in studies, you should take up placement .
review_content.Infrastructure: They don't have any hostel. All students take their own house rent. They have their own room and canteen. There are 3 canteen. They have an Amul canteen, but one canteen is not good. The other 2 are the best in food and food quality are best in our college in sport field, they are the best because they are the best. They have all grounds.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Sc. in Microbiology - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: Overall, I would like to say that this is one of the best colleges I have ever researched.

review_content.Placements: I can't say in percentage, but most of the students got placements in the best companies. They provide the best packages. Around 80-85% of students got internships from this college. Our college is very good and tries to give you the best knowledge and placements.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our college provides library facilities. The environment of our college library is peaceful. Our provides Wi-Fi to improve the skills to study and grow to gain knowledge. Our classrooms are huge. Their environment is very friendly.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelors of Business Administration (BBA) - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: A great infrastructure with facilities, but fell short of faculty and placments in 2023.

review_content.Placements: Placement rates for BBA from top institutes can be 100%, while for mid-tier institutes, it can range between 60% - 80%. The average salary package was 3 LPA - 5 LPA. Top recruiting companies include BCG, Amazon, Brain, IBM, Microsoft, and top consulting and finance firms.
review_content.Infrastructure: For a BBA course, facilities and infrastructure generally provide a conducive environment for both academic learning and extracurricular activities. Computer labs are equipped with business-related software and tools for data analysis. Smart classrooms are also available.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science Engineering - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: I am living a very amazing college life at Vikrant University.

review_content.Placements: Only 20 percent of the students were placed in Computer Science. The highest package is 70 LPA, the average package is 4 LPA, and the lowest package is 2.5 LPA. Google and Microsoft are also recruiting from Vikrant University. 40 percent of students got internships in some companies like Innoctor EduTech and RoboTech. Software Engineer is a top role in Computer Science.
review_content.Infrastructure: Facilities are well maintained and infrastructure is also good. All the necessary things are available, like: Wi-Fi, laboratories, cricket ground, classrooms, technical laboratories, and library. The canteen is average, but medical facilities, sports, and games are amazing.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelors of Business Administration (BBA) - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: A step towards a bright future and career.

review_content.Placements: 50% of students are placed in my course. The study curriculum is good for the students. Companies like Reliance, Infosys, Microsoft, Capgemini, etc. are the top recruiting companies on my campus. Roles like marketing analysis officer, HR manager, and manager are offered in my course. The highest package offered was INR 30 lacs, and the lowest was INR 2.5 lacs this year in my course. Students with average percentages like 75% and above 85–90% got internship offers and placements.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of my college is so good. The environment, classrooms, computer lab, Science lab, and Wi-Fi facility are good. In my department, facilities are good. Eight ceiling fans are in every classroom. The seating system is also good. I have not used the hostel facilities, but the canteen is not very good and does not offer a wide variety of food. A medical facility is also on my campus, and it is good for emergency purposes. Sports and many games are also played on my campus.

faqs.question: Can I get direct admission for M.Tech at Vikrant University?

answer.text: Yes, applications are open at Vikrant University for various courses. The mode of application is online/offline. Vikrant University application process 2025 is conducted both online/offline. The application fee for PhD course is INR 1,000. Candidates can fill out the application form on the university's official website.

faqs.question: Are applications open for admission to various courses at Vikrant University?

answer.text: Vikrant University admissions are currently open for various courses. The university offers courses such as BTech, BCA, MBA, M.Tech etc., at the UG and PG level. Apart from the UG and PG courses, the university also offers certificate, diploma, PhD and vocational courses. Vikrant University admission 2025 is entrance-based for PhD courses. However, candidates are selected based on merit for the rest of the course level, i.e., UG, PG, Certificate, Diploma and Vocational. Interested candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can fill out the form.

content.Placements: I don't remember the exact number, but a lot of students from my batch have got placed, and the average package is Rs. 2.5 Lacs per annum. The highest package is around 8 to 10 Lacs per annum, and the average package is around 2.5 Lacs per annum. A lot of companies come, like Gal India Pvt. Ltd. and VPS Pvt. Ltd., etc. Around 25 to 30% of students got placed in my batch. They offer many roles like fire safety engineer, IT engineer, consultant, system engineer, etc.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure here is good, and the faculty is also fine. They mingle well with the students and are not pressurized too much. The faculty here is such that their method of studying is very different, and they teach very well. Every year, events and organizations like tournaments are organized here, in which anyone from the city can take part and win a lot of prizes.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelors in Computer Application (BCA) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Yes, all are good for placement, and the overall experience is also good.

content.Placements: Placement is average. Those students who are good in our course and are placed in a company are the highest, approximately 10 Lacs. The lowest is 3 Lacs. For internships, 100% of students get an internship. Annual income is not good, but placement is good not any problem. If you are good in studies, you should take up placement .
content.Infrastructure: They don't have any hostel. All students take their own house rent. They have their own room and canteen. There are 3 canteen. They have an Amul canteen, but one canteen is not good. The other 2 are the best in food and food quality are best in our college in sport field, they are the best because they are the best. They have all grounds.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Microbiology - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Overall, I would like to say that this is one of the best colleges I have ever researched.

content.Placements: I can't say in percentage, but most of the students got placements in the best companies. They provide the best packages. Around 80-85% of students got internships from this college. Our college is very good and tries to give you the best knowledge and placements.
content.Infrastructure: Our college provides library facilities. The environment of our college library is peaceful. Our provides Wi-Fi to improve the skills to study and grow to gain knowledge. Our classrooms are huge. Their environment is very friendly.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelors of Business Administration (BBA) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: A great infrastructure with facilities, but fell short of faculty and placments in 2023.

content.Placements: Placement rates for BBA from top institutes can be 100%, while for mid-tier institutes, it can range between 60% - 80%. The average salary package was 3 LPA - 5 LPA. Top recruiting companies include BCG, Amazon, Brain, IBM, Microsoft, and top consulting and finance firms.
content.Infrastructure: For a BBA course, facilities and infrastructure generally provide a conducive environment for both academic learning and extracurricular activities. Computer labs are equipped with business-related software and tools for data analysis. Smart classrooms are also available.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: I am living a very amazing college life at Vikrant University.

content.Placements: Only 20 percent of the students were placed in Computer Science. The highest package is 70 LPA, the average package is 4 LPA, and the lowest package is 2.5 LPA. Google and Microsoft are also recruiting from Vikrant University. 40 percent of students got internships in some companies like Innoctor EduTech and RoboTech. Software Engineer is a top role in Computer Science.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities are well maintained and infrastructure is also good. All the necessary things are available, like: Wi-Fi, laboratories, cricket ground, classrooms, technical laboratories, and library. The canteen is average, but medical facilities, sports, and games are amazing.

admission_overview.title: Vikrant University Admission Overview 2025
admission_overview.description: Vikrant University admission is merit/entrance-based as per the respective courses. The university offers various courses such as BTech, BCA, MBA, MTech etc., at the UG and PG level. Apart from the UG and PG courses, the university also offers certificate, diploma, PhD and vocational courses. The university has more than 10 schools on the Gwalior campus. To get admitted to VU, candidates must meet the eligibility criteria set by the university. The application process at Vikrant University is conducted both online or offline. Read the following article to know more about Vikrant University course admission 2025.

faqs.question: Who can enroll for admission at Vikrant University?

paragraphs: Vikrant University admissionsare primarily entrance-based. Candidates can register online for admission to the course. The admission process at Vikrant University is below:-
Vikrant University Application Process 2025

The mode of application is online/offline. For UG and PG courses, candidates must visit the official website and for the PhD courses, students can either apply online or offline. The application fee for PhD course is INR 2,000. To apply offline for the PhD course, students must go to the institute campus. Candidates can fill out the application form on the university's official website.

The university accepts entrance exam scores such as GATE and JEE Main for admission to the MTech & BTech courses. For PhD course admission, candidates are selected based on in-house entrance exam scores, VU Research Aptitude Test followed by PI.
Merit List & Admission Confirmation

After the release of theVikrant University cutoff, it also releases a merit list based on the score of the candidates for admission. Shortlisted students need to come for document verification and pay theVikrant University feeto confirm their seats in the university.

faqs.question: How can I get admission to various courses at Vikrant University?
faqs.answer: Vikrant University admissions are entrance-based. The university considers national-level entrance exam scores for various course admission. The mode of application is online/offline. For UG and PG courses, candidates must visit the official website and for the PhD courses, aspirants can either apply online or offline. The application fee for PhD course is INR 2,000. To apply offline for the PhD course, students must visit the institute campus. Candidates can fill out the application form on the university's official website. Selected candidates must keep their educational documents ready for verification purposes.

faqs.question: Are admissions to various courses open at Vikrant University?
faqs.answer: Vikrant University admissions are currently open for various courses. The university offers courses such as BTech, BCA, MBA, M.Tech etc., at the UG and PG level. Apart from the UG and PG courses, the university also offers certificate, diploma, PhD and vocational courses. Vikrant University admission 2025 is entrance-based for PhD courses. However, candidates are selected based on merit for the rest of the course level, i.e., UG, PG, Certificate, Diploma and Vocational. Interested candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can fill out the form.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Vikrant University.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure here is good, and the faculty is also fine. They mingle well with the students and are not pressurized too much. The faculty here is such that their method of studying is very different, and they teach very well. Every year, events and organizations like tournaments are organized here, in which anyone from the city can take part and win a lot of prizes.

reviews.review_heading: Yes, all are good for placement, and the overall experience is also good.
reviews.review_text: They don't have any hostel. All students take their own house rent. They have their own room and canteen. There are 3 canteen. They have an Amul canteen, but one canteen is not good. The other 2 are the best in food and food quality are best in our college in sport field, they are the best because they are the best. They have all grounds.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, I would like to say that this is one of the best colleges I have ever researched.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides library facilities. The environment of our college library is peaceful. Our provides Wi-Fi to improve the skills to study and grow to gain knowledge. Our classrooms are huge. Their environment is very friendly.

reviews.review_heading: A great infrastructure with facilities, but fell short of faculty and placments in 2023.
reviews.review_text: For a BBA course, facilities and infrastructure generally provide a conducive environment for both academic learning and extracurricular activities. Computer labs are equipped with business-related software and tools for data analysis. Smart classrooms are also available.

reviews.review_heading: I am living a very amazing college life at Vikrant University.
reviews.review_text: Facilities are well maintained and infrastructure is also good. All the necessary things are available, like: Wi-Fi, laboratories, cricket ground, classrooms, technical laboratories, and library. The canteen is average, but medical facilities, sports, and games are amazing.

reviews.review_heading: A step towards a bright future and career.
reviews.review_text:
The infrastructure of my college is so good. The environment, classrooms, computer lab, Science lab, and Wi-Fi facility are good. In my department, facilities are good.
Eight ceiling fans are in every classroom. The seating system is also good.
I have not used the hostel facilities, but the canteen is not very good and does not offer a wide variety of food. A medical facility is also on my campus, and it is good for emergency purposes. Sports and many games are also played on my campus.

reviews.review_heading: It is an excellent college with good facilities and motivated teachers.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides excellent facilities. The quality of food is good and healthy. Computer labs are good. Many books are available in the library. Games and sports teachers are available. Indoor and outdoor games are provided by this university. Medical facilities are available.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Vikrant University.
reviews.review_text: Our college has good infrastructure. Wi-Fi is available. Our classrooms are clean. There is a library and a canteen. There are 3-4 buildings, one for management, one for technical, and another for administration. There is sufficient space in classrooms to study.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Vikrant University.
reviews.review_text: The college is painted, so it looks good. A huge playground is available. Many games are played, like basketball, cricket, etc. There is a canteen, a washroom, and an excellent computer lab. We also have a library.

reviews.review_heading: It is an excellent university in the Gwalior region as well as in Madhya Pradesh.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides good facilities. Wi-Fi is available throughout the campus, like in libraries, labs, etc., The college is under CCTV surveillance. Our classrooms are good. The canteen is good.

reviews.review_heading: It is an excellent university in Gwalior.
reviews.review_text: There is a separate department for B.Tech. The campus is neat and clean. There are many classrooms. A canteen is available. The quality of food in the canteen is good. There are many labs, like chemistry, physics, mechanical labs, etc. Workshop facilities are available.

reviews.review_heading: It is the best university in Gwalior.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is good. It has advanced labs for practical learning, a central library, an auditorium, sports grounds and facilities, drinking water, a canteen, etc. Classrooms are well-lighted and spacious.

reviews.review_heading: Our college provides good atmosphere for education.
reviews.review_text: Library of our college is good. Canteen is available. There are good classrooms and medical facilities. Our college provides good sports teachers.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Vikrant Institute of Technology and Management, Gwalior.
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure is good. The campus has a playground, where all the engineering and management students can play lots of sports. In my opinion, the infrastructure is good. There are several buildings for academics.

reviews.review_heading: It is the best college in Gwalior.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is one of the best infrastructures in Gwalior city. It has free Wi-Fi, has a medium-size library which is also a digital library. Classroom of our college in just like as hall of a house, about 100-120 student can sit in one time.

college_info.intro:
Maharishi Arvind University courses offer UG, PG and PhD level programmes offered through the faculty of Computer Science, Law, Pharmacy, Commerce and Management, Basic and Applied Science, Social Science and Humanities, Education, Health and Allied Science and Agriculture Science. The University has 150+ faculties and 10+ academic programmes.
Maharishi Arvind University offers BSc, BPharma, BEd and PhD level programmes for the span of 2 years to 5 years. Candidates must secure a minimum aggregate of 45% to 50% in Class 12 for various UG-level programmes. Similarly, for various PG-level programmes, candidates must secure a minimum aggregate in graduation.
The MAU University Jaipur courses fee structure ranges from INR 60 K to INR 3 Lakh. For more details about MAUJ popular programmes, check out the table given below:

Students can visit official website of the university and download the form and submit it along with a demand draft drawn in favour of "Maharishi Arvind University Jaipur" payable at Jaipur. Alternatively, candidates can directly visit the admission office of the university and register in-person for the course of choice. In case of any queries, students can fill out the Admission Enquiry Form available on MAU Jaipur's website.

faqs.answer: A:    Maharishi Arvind University LLM admissions are subject to a valid score in the MAULET exam conducted by the university itself. Students looking to enrol in either LLM or other law courses must appear for the exam to be eligible for admissions. The university doesn't accept CLAT scores. Hence, students can certainly get into the LLM programme offered at MAU Jaipur without CLAT, given they fulfil the eligibility criteria and provide MAULET scores. For any queries, students can reach out to the admission help desk of the university.

admission_overview.college_name: Maharishi Arvind University Admission 2025: Application Process, Eligibility, Courses & Fee

paragraphs: Maharishi Arvind University admission 2025 is open.The university offers numerous UG, PG, diploma, and PhD courses, These courses are offered in the fields of Agricultural Science, Law, Computer Science & Informatics, Commerce, Education, and Physiotherapy Commonly known asMAUJ, the university accepts students on both entrance and merit basis depending on the programme chosen. Interested students can read the following article to know about the courses, eligibility, selection criteria, and admission procedure for Maharishi Arvind University.

Maharishi Arvind University course admissionis subject to fulfilment of the course-specific admission criteria as per the university's guidelines. Students are shortlisted based on several parameters, including entrance exam scores (if applicable) and academic merit. The university provides an extensive range of courses thorough its departments. Students can check out the table below to learn about the eligibility and selection criteria for some of the popularMaharishi Arvind University courses:

The admission procedure for Maharishi Arvind University involves several steps, such as application, selection, appearing for the entrance exam (if applicable), and admission confirmation, Students must fulfil the eligibility criteria of the desired programme before proceeding further. Eligible students can follow the step-wiseMAUJ admission processmentioned below:
Step 1; MAUJ Application Process 2025

Interested students can visit the official website of the university and click on the "Apply Now" button to fill out the enquiry form. Alternatively, students can also download the course-wise application form available and submit the duly filled-in form to the University City office along with the demand draft drawn in favour of MAUJ.
Step 2; MAUJ Selection Process 2025

The university shortlists candidates based on various parameters. Maharishi Arvind University's selection process differs on the basis of course wise. For MBA admissions, the university accepts a valid CAT score, while for law courses, students need to appear for the MUALET exam conducted by the university. For the remaining programmes, candidates are selected on the basis of merit in the qualifying exams.
Step 3: MAUJ Admission Confirmation

Selected candidates will be given the Offer of Admission letters by either email or post. The merit list is also displayed on the university's official website. Students need to report to the university with the offer letter and required documents for verification. Post the verification, seats will be allotted once the candidates pay the admission fees.

The course is offered for a duration of 1-2 years. Students can check out the following highlights to know aboutMAU Jaipur LLM admission:

faqs.question: Can I take admission to LLM at Maharishi Arvind University, Jaipur without CLAT?
faqs.answer: Maharishi Arvind University LLM admissionsare subject to a valid score in the MAULET exam conducted by the university itself. Students looking to enrol in either LLM or other law courses must appear for the exam to be eligible for admissions. The university doesn't accept CLAT scores. Hence, students can certainly get into the LLM programme offered at MAU Jaipur without CLAT, given they fulfil the eligibility criteria and provide MAULET scores. For any queries, students can reach out to the admi

faqs.question: Which entrance exam scores does Maharishi Arvind University accept for admission to LL.M.?
faqs.answer: Maharishi Arvind University accepts the following entrance exam scores for admission to LL.M:Maharishi Arvind University Law Entrance Test (MAULET) conducted by the UniversityThe minimum marks required for LL.M. at Himachal Pradesh National Law University (HPNLU) in 2023 is 55% in LL.M. as per UGC normsThese are the specific entrance exams and minimum marks required for admission to the LL.M. programme at Maharishi Arvind University.

faqs.question: Can I become a lawyer after completing my LLB?
faqs.answer: No, After completing LLB you become a lawyer, however, you are still not an advocate and hence cannot practice law.To become an advocate and to practice law as a profession, you mandatorily need to clear theAll India Bar Examination (AIBE). After qualifying AIBE, one can practice law as a full fledged profession.

hostel_campus.college_name: Maharishi Arvind University Infrastructure Details & Reviews

hostel.description: Maharishi Arvind University’s hostel has air-cooled room, mess facility is also available in the campus itself and a well-furnished and modern cafeteria with a lively environment, for providing hygienic and nutritious food and snacks. Facilities for indoor and outdoor games are also available.

sports.description: Available Facilities: Badminton Court, Cricket Ground, Volleyball Court, Table Tennis, Kabbadi Ground

hostel.description: Maharishi Arvind University’s hostel has air-cooled room, mess facility is also available in the campus itself and a well-furnished and modern cafeteria with a lively environment, for providing hygienic and nutritious food and snacks. Facilities for indoor and outdoor games are also available.

sports.description: Available Facilities: Badminton Court, Cricket Ground, Volleyball Court, Table Tennis, Kabbadi Ground

labs.description: Available Facilities: Computer Lab, Science Lab

reviews.review_heading: Good placement. Really good.
reviews.review_text: College provides excellent sports facilities a medical center a library Wi-Fi classrooms and hostels. The canteen offers food and the labs have modern infrastructure available for all departments. Sports and games are well-organised and the medical center ensures health services for students.

reviews.review_heading: The truth of Maharshi Arvind University .
reviews.review_text: Actually this is the best part of our university, the infrastructure, the design and the amount of money they had  used in the infrastructure of the university. University doesn't have Wi-Fi connectivity for the students nor in the library. Even mobile phones are not allowed in the University's library. University has an auditorium, a cricket ground etc.

reviews.review_heading: Our college provides good placements.
reviews.review_text: The hostel facility is not available. A mess and canteen are available. The quality of food in the canteen is good and affordable. Labs are available and well-maintained. A library is available. Wi-Fi is not available.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied because of the infrastructure, faculty members, and facilities.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is available throughout the campus. The best and most peaceful environment is the library because it's too quiet to study. Our classrooms are too good. Our laboratories are bright and well-ventilated. There is no hostel, but PG services are available within 500 meters.

reviews.review_heading: Our university is good for better education.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is good. A huge library is available for students. Our classrooms are in good condition. The sports culture is not good in our college.

reviews.review_heading: It is one of the best private universities in Jaipur.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is basically spread in a vast area. It has an eco-friendly zone with many sports facilities and other academic activities. It also has facilities like computer labs, science labs, etc. It is mainly connected with the main Sirsi road Jaipur. It has a personal library so that students don't need to buy books from outside.

reviews.review_heading: There is good infrastructure and surroundings.
reviews.review_text: Labs are available in our university. There are different labs for all students according to their course. The library is available in the university with a good environment. There is a canteen in the university. The food served is good like normal drinks and snacks. Medical facilities are also available.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with the faculty members but placements are not good.
reviews.review_text: Lab are well equipped, and all the instruments are available. Wi-Fi facility is not appropriate, library and classroom are well-maintained. Smart classes are also available for students. Canteen food is not good as I expected but mess food is good as compared to the canteen.

reviews.review_heading: I am dissatisfied because of faculty members and placements.
reviews.review_text: There are no hostel facilities. Our university has its own library and canteen, and free Wi-Fi is also available. Classrooms have good furniture and all essential things. Our university has basketball ground, cricket ground and indoor games ground also.

reviews.review_heading: The college has a good infrastructure and faculty members.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our course is very good. There are smart classrooms with a projector setup. The furniture of the classrooms is very good, and there is a library on every floor with books related to every course. The atmosphere of the library is very calm. However, the college has no hostel.

reviews.review_heading: The campus is good. Courses are available, but the drawback is there are no placements.
reviews.review_text: All facilities are available on our campus. Wi-Fi is available, but they don't provide a password. Labs are available, and the classrooms are good. There is also a library, where lots of books are available for reading/learning. Every year a sports week is organised by the university on the campus.

reviews.review_heading: Facilities are not so good, and the course can also be better.
reviews.review_text: Our college has very weak Wi-Fi, and it's protected with a password. Neither they give the password to use, nor they open it for college time. Facilities are not provided in our college, and no one wants to study here. There is a small canteen which will always be closed.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, the college is good with good faculty. The issues here will be resolved shortly.
reviews.review_text: There are lots of issues related to the infrastructure. The college doesn't provide any sports facility, and even the washrooms are not properly cleaned and maintained well. However, our classrooms are good, and the labs are well maintained and equipped with good machines. Our canteen is good, and the quality of the food offered in the canteen is also good.

reviews.review_heading: Students can choose this college if they want to go for agriculture branch.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is moderate in the college. It is neither good, nor too bad. Labs are well equipped. Wi-Fi and washrooms are not in good condition. There is no proper arrangement for sports and games. Only a cricket ground is available for the students.

reviews.review_heading: The college has learning empowerment.
reviews.review_text: The college has a good infrastructure with natural air-conditioning. There is no Wi-Fi available on the campus because it focuses only on studies. The library is pretty big where students can spend their time with friends. The ayurvedic faculty team is available in the next building where medical and research labs are also available.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: I am satisfied with my choice of college because it has everything a medical student needs.

content.Placements: So because it is a medical college, most of the students you will find are bonded, so you have to work for the government for up to 1 year, and you will get INR 60–70k per month for this. And if I am talking about an internship, then patient flow is good. You will get to know about some diseases that are rare, but you can also learn your basic skills, which you must know after MBBS. You will find many patients in the hospital.
content.Infrastructure: Our college is the best in terms of infrastructure out of all the colleges in Hemchandracharya, North Gujarat University. Hostels are good for only INR 6,000 a year. If it does not have Wi-Fi, all over-the-net connectivity is fine. Labs are also good with all available gadgets, and the library has central AC with all standard and student-friendly text books that you can issue. The quality of food is also good, with a minimum cost of INR 2200 per month. We have a badminton court and a cricket ground for playing.

content.Infrastructure: Good facilities and infrastructure, including a lab, library, and computer room, are available. A good hostel with average food. description: AIIMS, Jammu cutoff 2025 is available on this page for various accepting exams. Candidates can refer to the exam-wise sections below to view the cutoff details across different rounds and categories. Other important updates are as follows:

AIIMS, Jammu NEET UG cutoff 2025 was concluded with the release of the final seat allotment result for admission to the MBBS course. The cutoff was released for several categories belonging to the AI quota. For the General AI quota, the NEET UG last round closing rank was 10215 for MBBS admission. Candidates can refer to the table below to view the first and last round cutoffs 2025 for the General AI category students.

AIIMS, Jammu MBBS cutoff 2025 was 10215 for the students belonging to the General AI quota. Similarly, for the OBC category students, the NEET UG last round closing rank was 4335 for admission to the MBBS course. For other categories and rounds, use the provided filters.

AIIMS, Jammu accepts the NEET UG entrance exam for selecting students to the MBBS course. Candidates with a valid score are then eligible for the NEET UG counselling. For 2026 admission, aspirants must refer to the table below to view some of the important NEET UG 2026 dates to be eligible for admission.

Candidates preparing for admission can refer to the table below to view or download the NEET UG round and year-wise consolidated cutoff list. This will help students to understand the past three years' cutoff trends.
AIIMS, Jammu INI CET cutoff 2026 has been released for the postgraduate courses MD, MS, M.Ch., etc. At Round 3, the closing ranks ranged from 1105 to 24603 for students in the General AI quota.

Considering the ranks, the most competitive for admission was MD in Obstetrics and Gynaecology, with a lowest cutoff rank of 1105. On the otherhand, the least competitive was MD in Physiology, with INI CET 2026 cutoff rank of for admission in the General category.

In the table below, candidates can find the INI CET round- and category-wise cut-off details for admission to various PG medical courses. For General AI category students, the top three most competitive courses for admission were MD in Obstetrics and Gynaecology, MS in ENT (Otorhinolaryngology) and M.Ch. in Pediatric Surgery, with Round 3 closing ranks of 1105, 1124 and 1772, respectively.

INI CET counselling is conducted in four rounds: mock round, first round, second round, and open round. All the rounds of counselling are conducted online. Candidates appearing for admission via INI CET can refer to the table provided below to view or download the round and year-wise INI CET cutoff lists.
AIIMS, Jammu B.Sc. cutoff 2025 was 1853 in the last round. In 2024, the last round closing rank for the same course was 1787 for the students belonging to the General AI quota.
For the OBC category students, the AIIMS Nursing cutoff 2025 for the B.Sc. course was 3365 in the last round. For other categories and rounds, use the provided filters.

reviews_list.review_title: It provides good placements in rural areas, and the infrastructure is average.

review_content.Placements: There are 150 students in our batch. Something there are 100 internships pass, and also others depending upon mark opted. Many patients come in per day, 2500 patent daily come to hospital for treatment, because of the rural area so practice is very important for interns.
review_content.Infrastructure: It provides a library, Wi-Fi, classroom, and laboratories It has parking space, television room, and also playground is provided. The food is good, free medical facilities like check-up treatment are there. Many games are played in the hostel inside also outside has 2 playgrounds. In the hostel, there are football, table tennis, badminton, and many more.

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2023
reviews_list.review_title: It is a great college with a large campus and a weak city.

review_content.Placements: MBBS undergraduate and postgraduate seats of nearly all courses available here are medicine, pediatrics, obstetrics, gynecology, surgery, anesthesiology, radiology, anatomy, physiology, biochemistry, path micro, PSM and orthopedics. For MBBS, there are 150 students per batch.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our college has one of the best hostels, and 2-3 students are allotted in one room. There is a large playground for volleyball, badminton and table tennis. Indoor mess is available. A cricket ground is also available, and juniors and seniors have a great rapport. There are 5 hostels, i.e., 2 boys hostels, 2 girls hostels and a PG hostel.

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: Good college with proper ambience for studies and daily patients count in opd is around 2000.

review_content.Placements: There are 150 students in my class from 85% comes through state quota and 15% comes through all india quota. My college is known for its result and for its work. review_summary.college_name: Swami Ramanand Teerth Rural Medical College Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely satisfied with faculty members and fests but dissatisfied with infrastructure.

content.Placements: MBBS here offers 100% results. In internships, there is a high patient flow in hospitals, and students get selected in PG in top colleges of India like AIIMS and of Maharashtra like KEM, B.J, and many more. There are many successful doctors who have done their MBBS here.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is good but not up to mark. It is an old college, almost 50 years old. They are trying their best to make it look new and good. Currently, the hostel is not available for the first year. A new hostel is constructed which is very good in infrastructure with all the facilities in it which will soon be available for students.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Our college is the Asia's 1st rural government medical college.

content.Placements: As our country needs doctors so nearly 90-100% of students get a job and also the bond of a compulsory 1-year job is available in all the government medical colleges. So there is no problem with the job after the degree. Some people also prepare for the NEET PG exam.
content.Infrastructure: The hostel quality is quite good on campus. The college infrastructure is good. A library is also available and one new library is started recently. The mess is available in the hostel and the quality of food served is quite good. The canteen is moderate. Some sports facilities are available on campus.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: It provides good placements in rural areas, and the infrastructure is average.

content.Placements: There are 150 students in our batch. Something there are 100 internships pass, and also others depending upon mark opted. Many patients come in per day, 2500 patent daily come to hospital for treatment, because of the rural area so practice is very important for interns.
content.Infrastructure: It provides a library, Wi-Fi, classroom, and laboratories It has parking space, television room, and also playground is provided. The food is good, free medical facilities like check-up treatment are there. Many games are played in the hostel inside also outside has 2 playgrounds. In the hostel, there are football, table tennis, badminton, and many more.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: It is a great college with a large campus and a weak city.

content.Placements: MBBS undergraduate and postgraduate seats of nearly all courses available here are medicine, pediatrics, obstetrics, gynecology, surgery, anesthesiology, radiology, anatomy, physiology, biochemistry, path micro, PSM and orthopedics. For MBBS, there are 150 students per batch.
content.Infrastructure: Our college has one of the best hostels, and 2-3 students are allotted in one room. There is a large playground for volleyball, badminton and table tennis. Indoor mess is available. A cricket ground is also available, and juniors and seniors have a great rapport. There are 5 hostels, i.e., 2 boys hostels, 2 girls hostels and a PG hostel.

individual_reviews.title: Good college with proper ambience for studies and daily patients count in opd is around 2000.

Indoor mess is available. A cricket ground is also available, and juniors and seniors have a great rapport. There are 5 hostels, i.e., 2 boys hostels, 2 girls hostels and a PG hostel.

reviews.review_heading: Asia's first rural GMC, good healthcare education !
reviews.review_text:
There is a big college building & hostel is available, separate for boys as well as girls. Hostel has shared rooms for 2-3 students. Library has AC, Wi-fi services.
For sports, there is ground behind college building. Gym in culture hall & food quality is okay.

reviews.review_heading: My college is the first rural government college in the Asia & I am proud of my college.
reviews.review_text: My college infrastructure is very good & is about 100 acres. There are around 19 departments in my college. Also the hostel are very comfortable for new batches too & also there is new hostels & new opd gpr colleges are in the under construction.

reviews.review_heading: Asias first Rural Government Medical College.
reviews.review_text: The facilities present in the hostel and college premises are good. The hostel is very well maintained. Security concerns are well solved by college administration. Also the mess is very good and provides healthy food and the sports facility is quite well .

reviews.review_heading: Really satisfied by academics and facilities.
reviews.review_text: Hostel facilities are good, hostel mess is average, medical facilities are satisfying. All the departments are well equipped, we have various lectures hall for different departments. The practical labs are fully equipped. The number of cadavers are also enough. We can avail the Wi-Fi in library.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied for taking admission for the MBBS course in this college in 2020.
reviews.review_text: The hostel of our college is very good and clean. The quality of food in the hostel mess is very good. You need to pay only for the mess, but it is worth paying. The quality is also very good. I strongly prefer staying at the hostel with colleagues and enjoying the college hostel life with friends.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with the college because of the good faculty and infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is much better than expected in government institutes. All classrooms are hi-tech, well-equipped with projectors and digital equipment. All labs have all instruments needed for performing practicals. Central library is also in good condition. Library has a Wi-Fi connection for students. Old hostels are average like other medical colleges but new hostel buildings are under construction. The mess facility is available in the hostel. Mess quality is average. There is a central cantee...

reviews.review_heading: It is Asia's 1st rural government medical college.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is above average. Our college building's infrastructure is very good. The hostel is average, but the good thing is the new hostel construction is almost 80% completed. Soon new hostels will be allotted, and that new hostel is A1.

reviews.review_heading: It's the first rural area college with good patient flow. It's a good campus outside of the village.
reviews.review_text: We got a hostel apartment, but it is not in good condition. Wi-Fi is not available in the hostel, but it is available in the college. The mess is available in the hostel. The construction of the hostel is going on, but it is very slow. It may take one or two years. For sports, we have an auditorium, but now it is converted into a vaccination center for covid.

reviews.review_heading: Our college has the best faculty members ever.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure and faculty members of our college are the best. They are hardworking and support us. Our labs are well managed. Classrooms are the best ones. The library is available 24 hours. The mess is all good and the food is prepared over there with full hygiene. There is safety for girls too.

admission_overview.college_name: Devsthali Vidyapeeth Group of Institutions Admission 2025: Courses, Eligibility, Admission Process

paragraphs: Devsthali Vidyapeeth admission 2025is a blend of merit and entrance basis depending on the programme. The procedure for admission at the institute generally commences online, but offline applications are also accepted.Devsthali Vidyapeethaccepts several national and state-level exams. Students can pursue various courses at undergraduate, postgraduate, and diploma levels. These programmes are offered in the fields of Pharmacy, Nursing, Commerce, Management, etc. Interested students can read the following article to know all about the key admission highlights including the offered courses at Devsthali Vidyapeeth and their respective eligibility and selection criteria.

Devsthali Vidyapeeth course admission is done on the basis of preset criteria. The institute accepts candidates through either entrance or merit in the last qualifying exam. UG admission requires candidates to pass Class 12 with relevant subjects, whereas PG admissions are done on the basis of graduation and entrance scores. The table below details the eligibility and selection criteria forDevsthali Vidyapeeth courses:

The admission procedure for Devsthali Vidyapeeth includes multiple steps, such as application, selection criteria, and admission confirmation. Students seeking admission into the institute need to fulfil the admission criteria of the desired programme. The process can be completed either online or offline. The steps explained below mention the detailedDevsthali Vidyapeeth admission process:
Step 1: Application Process
Visit the official website of the institute and apply for the desired programme by filling out the application form. Alternatively, the process can be completed offline as well.
Step 2: Selection Process

The institute shortlists candidates either on an entrance basis or based on their scores in the last qualifying exam depending on the programme. It is also important to meet the basic eligibility criteria in addition to providing entrance exam scores (if applicable).
Step 3: Admission Confirmation
To confirm the seats, students need to go through document verification and payDevsthali Vidyapeeth fees.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery (MBBS) - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: Provides an excellent balance of academics and peace.

review_content.Placements: First, after MBBS, you have to serve a bond of 2 years of rural service, which would be signed at the time of admission. After that, you may serve as a tutor after clearing OPSE and then prepare for NEET PG. Once you do so and complete your PG in a branch, you can apply for JRship, SRship, Andhra Pradesh, AoP, etc. posts under respective departments.
review_content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure and hostel both are topnotch, and as it's a new college, almost everything is under the control of the students, i.e., the respective representatives, secretaries, and student unions. All grievances are well heard and settled within 1-2 days. Same goes about mess as well. The quality of food is under the control of the Mess Committee. Bill would be prepared on the basis of how many meals you have had and hence not included in the brochure.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery (MBBS) - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: Faculty are excellent and college environment is good.

review_content.Placements: Basically, studying at an MBBS college means you have to be a doctor and it's good for society and for your family as well. The highest package is 2 lakh. The lowest package was 70,000. You have to qualify for NEET. 100 percent students get their internship. Serving people is a clear role in our professions.
review_content.Infrastructure: There are all the facilities that a student needs. The labs are present. Smart classrooms, a library, and campus Wi-Fi are present. The hostel has a study room, recreation room, mess and well room. Mess has good-quality food and proper hygiene maintained. Sports facility is there. Students play games.

overview_faqs.answer: The fee for the MSW course offered by UOK Kotak is INR 18,000. Kotak University offers a regular Master of Social Work MSW course in a full-time mode. Candidates can avail hostel facilities offered by the University of Kotak. Hostel seat is offered on the basis of merit. The hostel allotment list is uploaded on the hostel notice board. Selected candidates can submit the required documents to get a seat along with the hostel fee. The hostel fee is INR 4,000 (approximately) and mess charges are as per the expenditure by the students.

admission_overview.college_name: Kota University Course Admissions 2025: Dates, Fee, Eligibility, Selection, Merit List

paragraphs: Kota University coursesoffers 42 undergraduate, postgraduate, and doctoral courses in various specialisations of Science, Pharmacy, Arts, Management, Commerce, Education, Law, and Physical Education. Apart from degree courses,Kota Universityalso offers two diploma courses & one certificate course. The mode of application for all the courses is online.Kota University admissionto various courses is merit-based or entrance exam-based. The university also offers UG and PG courses through its affiliated colleges.
Check the below infographic for the Kota University admission process for 2025:
Kota University Admission 2025: Eligibility and Selection

Kota University admissionto the undergraduate, postgraduate, doctoral-level, certificate & diploma courses is based on the entrance/merit score of candidates. The duration of all the PG courses is two years each. The table below covers the popular courses offered by Kota University along with respective eligibility, and entrance exams accepted by the university for admission:

University of Kota course admissions 2025 for some of its courses is either done based on merit or entrance exams. Check below the complete UOK admission process:
STEP 1: Kota University Application Process 2025

Kota University conducts the application process for various courses online. The application process for all the courses isINR 500. No application will be entertained in any condition after the last date of admission as given in the university notification.
STEP 2: Selection/ Shortlisting of Candidates

For all the candidates seeking admission to various UG, PG, and doctoral courses, selection will be based on entrance exam-based or merit-based as per the course opted by the candidate. Scores of national and state-level exams are also considered for several courses.
STEP 3: Payment of Admission Fee & Admission Confirmation
Candidates selected for various UG and PG courses need to pay the admission fee of the course to confirm their admission at the university.

faqs.answer: Kota University charges a one-time hostel fee ofINR 500from all its students with an additional refundable security deposit ofINR 2,000for Indian students andINR 10,000for foreign students. Nominal charges are also included in the hostel fee on a per-month basis, such as water (INR 100), electricity (INR 50), and hostel development (INR 100), etc. Mess charges are collected separately on the basis of actual expenditure with an annual advance of INR 5,000. The monthly hostel fee varies according

faqs.question: How to get admission at University of Kota for BPEd course?
faqs.answer: UOK is one of the reputed universities In India for education at the UG/PG/doctoral level. Admission to BPEd programmes of University of Kota is done on the basis of merit scores in the last qualifying exam and eligibility on the basis of their Class 12 scores. Those meeting the course-wise eligibility can secure admission to this university. The BPEd courses are offered by the affiliated colleges of UOK.

faqs.question: How do I enrol in a BPEd at Kota University?
faqs.answer: Candidates must complete their graduation. Kota University conducts the application process for various courses online. The application process for all the courses isINR 500.For all the candidates seeking admission to various UG, PG, and doctoral courses, selection will be based on entrance exam-based or merit-based as per the course opted by the candidate. Scores of national and state-level exams are also considered for several courses.

faqs.question: Which entrance exam is accepted by UOK?
faqs.answer: Kota University offers various courses at the UG, PG, and PhD level. Students are selected based on entrance exam or merit.. The application process is conducted online. Selected candidates for UG and PG courses must pay the admission fee to confirm their admission at the university.

faqs.question: What are the popular courses offered at UOK?
faqs.answer: Kotak University offers various programme such as certificate, diploma, undergraduate, postgraduate and PhD-level. The popular courses at Kota University areMBA,MSc, andBSc.  Admission to MBA course is based on entrance exams; however, for MSc and BSc courses it is merit-based.

faqs.question: Is the entrance exam compulsory to take admission to MBA at Kota University or can one take direct admission?
faqs.answer: Kota University (UOK) offers a regularMaster of Business Administration (MBA)course of a two-year duration. Kota University offers an MBA in two specialisations. Admission to an MBA is based on the entrance exam scores in any national-level Management exam. Kota University offers entrance exam-based admission to MBA. Mentioned below are the admission-related details of the course:Eligibility: Bachelor's degree in any discipline or equivalent degree.Selection: Entrance exam (CMAT/XAT/GMAT/MAT/CAT/ATMA) score.

faqs.question: What is the eligibility for various courses at University of Kota?
faqs.answer: Kotak University offers numerous Diploma, undergraduate, postgraduate, and PhD courses. Admission to all these levels is based on merit or entrance exams. Candidates can look at the information below to know about the eligibility and selection criteria for a few popular courses offered at Kotak University:CourseEligibility and Selection CriteriaMBA/ PGDMEligibility: Bachelor's degree in any disciplineSelection: XAT/ GMAT/ MAT/ CMAT/ CAT/ ATMAMScEligibility: BSc/ BCA or equivalent with 55% aggregate  (50% aggregate for MSc Zoology & Wild Life Science)Selection: MeritMCAEligibility: BCA/ Bachelor’s degree with a minimum of 50% aggregateSelection: NIMCETBPharmaEligibility: Class 12 with 50% aggregate in the Science streamSelection: MeritM.P.EdEligibility: Bachelor's degreeSelection: Merit

faqs.question: What is the application fee for admission to the University of Kota?
faqs.answer: The admission form fee for Kota University is INR 500. Kota University offers various undergraduate, postgraduate, and doctoral courses in various specialisations of Science, Pharmacy, Arts, Management, Commerce, Education, Law, and Physical Education. Apart from degree courses, Kota University also offers Diploma and Certificate courses. Admission to various courses is merit-based or entrance exam-based. Candidates should fulfil the basic eligibility criteria to be able to apply for various courses offered by Kota University. To submit an online application for admission to Kota University, go to the university's official website and fill it out properly. Submit the form and all necessary documentation, such as the score results from your most recent qualifying exam and a passport-size photo.

faqs.question: What is the fees of Kota University?
faqs.answer: The fee structure at Kota University varies depending on the specialisation and the college they are affiliated with. Check the table below to know the course-wise total tuition fee: Course Total Fee MBA/ PGDM INR 24,000 - INR 28,000 MSc INR 12,000 - INR 24,000 MCA INR 1.25 lakh BPharma INR 1.4 lakh M.P.Ed INR 40,000

faqs.question: What is the application fee for M.Ed at UOK?
faqs.answer: The application fee is INR 500. Kota University conducts the application process for various courses online. No application will be entertained in any condition after the last date of admission as given in the university notification.

highlights.summary: The KEAM 2026 registration for admission to the BE/BTech and BPharma courses is now over. The exam for the same will be conducted from Apr 13, 2026, to Apr 25, 2026.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2023
reviews_list.review_title: B.Pharma course is valuable if we go abroad.

review_content.Placements: In India, usually, pharmacy courses have no importance. People SEE pharmacists dispense medicine. But pharmacists have an essential role in the development of drugs and their evaluation. Students are not looking for a placement in an Indian company. They want to perform in foreign countries because foreign countries provide more salaries and opportunities in the Pharma field.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college infrastructure is good. They provide all the facilities like Wi-Fi, mess, transport, hostel, and football turf that is enough for a student. My hostel has separate rooms for each year's batch of students. Also, provide good food with affordable value. They also offer sports, games, etc.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: Really good infrastructure, facilities, and a good campus life.

review_content.Placements: Above 80%, no package fee, all are the same. Students must clear all papers and should have more than 80% in their plus two. They can start a shop or work in a hospital.
review_content.Infrastructure: Student Wi-Fi, computer lab, library for reference, canteen for food, microbiology lab, pathology lab, all are available. The environment is good, the campus is good, and facilities and faculty staff are all perfect. Classrooms have projectors. Hostel food is okay. Sports are conducted every year.
review_content.Faculty: Teachers are good and helpful, and the staff is well qualified. Companies are good and the teaching methods are good. The course is very relevant. Semester exams are quite tough. Students who score 50% marks can take the university exam. Teachers are very helpful and professional. Students can work independently. The fee structure for the first semester of the first year is Rs.1,35,000. There are 8 semesters in this course, and the fee is the same for all eight semesters. Students can work independently.

review_summary.college_name: KMCT College of Pharmaceutical Sciences Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: B.Pharma course is valuable if we go abroad.

content.Placements: In India, usually, pharmacy courses have no importance. People SEE pharmacists dispense medicine. But pharmacists have an essential role in the development of drugs and their evaluation. Students are not looking for a placement in an Indian company. They want to perform in foreign countries because foreign countries provide more salaries and opportunities in the Pharma field.
content.Infrastructure: The college infrastructure is good. They provide all the facilities like Wi-Fi, mess, transport, hostel, and football turf that is enough for a student. My hostel has separate rooms for each year's batch of students. Also, provide good food with affordable value. They also offer sports, games, etc.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Really good infrastructure, facilities, and a good campus life.

content.Placements: Above 80%, no package fee, all are the same. Students must clear all papers and should have more than 80% in their plus two. They can start a shop or work in a hospital.
content.Infrastructure: Student Wi-Fi, computer lab, library for reference, canteen for food, microbiology lab, pathology lab, all are available. The environment is good, the campus is good, and facilities and faculty staff are all perfect. Classrooms have projectors. Hostel food is okay. Sports are conducted every year.
content.Faculty: Teachers are good and helpful, and the staff is well qualified. Companies are good and the teaching methods are good. The course is very relevant. Semester exams are quite tough. Students who score 50% marks can take the university exam. Teachers are very helpful and professional. Students can work independently. The fee structure for the first semester of the first year is Rs.1,35,000. There are 8 semesters in this course, and the fee is the same for all eight semesters. Students can work independently.

hostel_campus.college_name: Bengal School of Technology and Management Infrastructure Details & Reviews

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied with the good placements and faculty members.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure are excellent here, plus the Wi-Fi connection is good for students to access the internet inside the campus. Classrooms and labs are neat and clean. Plus, the quality of food in the hostel and canteen is good to eat and delicious. Also, hostel rooms are neat and clean with good facilities available.

reviews.review_heading: One of the best colleges in Bengal for specific courses.
reviews.review_text: Bengal School of Technology and Management offered Wi-Fi enabled, smart classrooms, computer and science labs, and a well-stocked library. Hostels were decent with Wi-Fi and power/water. The hostel mess had both veg and non-veg food. We had gym and some sports facilities.

reviews.review_heading: This college is good. There are good teachers.
reviews.review_text: Every place is quite clean, whether it is a lab, a classroom, or even the common area. I don't live in the hostel, but I have seen it from outside, and it is quite clean and disciplined. There are enough books in the library, and even the flowers in the college are quite good.

reviews.review_heading: A decent college for studying but has very mediocre placements.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi wasn't there, labs and classroom were decent, library was very mediocre. Most systems in the lab were outdated but did the purpose. Hostel I am not that sure as I wasn't in the hostel. The food quality for the mess was okay but the cafeteria food was too rich.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Bengal School of Technology and Management .
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi connection is available but not for casual student use. Classrooms are provided for every year’s students, and a library is accessible to everyone. The canteen offers very good quality food. Medical facilities, sports, and games are available. There are also many game rooms.

reviews.review_heading: This college review can be helpful for everyone.
reviews.review_text: Our college infrastructure is average. Few facilities are available for our course. Hostel facilities are available. The quality of food is average in the canteen. 24-hour medical facilities are available for emergency cases. Our college conducts many types of sports and games.

reviews.review_heading: There are variety of facilities in our course like huge libraries and clean classrooms.
reviews.review_text:
There are various facilities in our course, like huge libraries and clean classrooms.
There are very neat and clean hostel rooms, a suitable ambiance and good food supplies like a canteen and cafeteria. There's also a huge play ground for students to play.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Bengal School of Technology and Management.
reviews.review_text:
Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms and libraries are all available for my course. 
The best quality of the facilities in my college is the hostel. The quality of food is also very good and mess and canteen are also available. 
Medical facilities, sports and games are also available .

reviews.review_heading: I love traveling, cooking, and organizing things.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure available for my college or department include Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, and a library. Labs for every subject are also available. The quality of the facilities in my hostel is excellent, the quality of food in the canteen is very good, and medical facilities and sports games are also available in very good quality.

reviews.review_heading: Bengal School of Technology.
reviews.review_text: In our college, the infrastructure is excellent. It feels like we are studying abroad. In our college, Wi-Fi, computers, a library, etc., are present so that students can feel just like home. In our hostel, canteen facilities are also available. Medical facilities, a sports room, etc., are available.

reviews.review_heading: Good placement in 2022, really good infrastructure and facilities, etc.
reviews.review_text: In our college, this BBA course is very effective in our future lives, And education-related facilities and opportunities are given in our college. Library, classroom, and labs are regularly cleaned and maintained. And this college provides hostel facilities. In hostels, good quality food is available.

reviews.review_heading: It has great and friendly faculty, which is the most important thing in a college.
reviews.review_text: The campus is great, no doubt. The campus is small but tidy. The canteen is really awesome, and every kind of food item is available. The mess prices are the best and really affordable, and the food quality is great and the best in taste. Everything is the best here.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Bengal School of Technology and Management.
reviews.review_text: Facilities are very good, and our college is absolutely up to the mark in terms of infrastructure. Classrooms are very neat and clean, and they have a kind of ambience that give us a study environment. Our college has arrangements for immediate medical facilities help. There is a canteen and cafeteria in our college, of which the cafe is for breakfast, and the canteen is for lunch. Sports and games facilities are the best in our college for both indoor and outdoor.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is well-furnished and budget-friendly.
reviews.review_text: Our college is up to the mark in terms of infrastructure. Classrooms are neat, clean and have a kind of ambience which give us a study environment. Our college has arrangements for immediate medical facilities help. The canteen and cafeteria are available in our college. A cafe is a kind for breakfast, and a canteen is for lunch. Sports and games facilities are the best in our college. It provides both indoor and outdoor games.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Bengal School of Technology and Management.
reviews.review_text: Our college is up to the mark in terms of infrastructure. Classrooms are very neat, clean and have a kind of ambience which give us a study environment. Our college has arrangements for immediate medical facilities help. The canteen and cafeteria are available in our college. The cafe is for breakfast, and the canteen is for lunch. Both indoor and outdoor games facilities are the best in our college.

faqs.question: What is the fee range for the courses offered at GSL Dental College?
Which courses does GSL Dental College offer?
Does GSL Dental College has good and experienced faculty?
What all specializations are provided by the courses offered at GSL Dental College?

fees_and_eligibility.overview: GSL Dental College is an institute which offers various courses at UG and PG levels. Students can choose Full Time programmes from stream such as Medicine & Health Sciences. At the UG level, students can choose the available programmes such as BDS. Talking about PG level, some of the available courses include MDS. The fee structure for the GSL Medical College programmes is around INR 46,304 to 8,91,000.

reviews_list.batch_info: BDS - Bachelor of Dental Surgery - Batch of 2023
reviews_list.review_title: It is a good college, and I am satisfied with it.

review_content.Placements: It is a professional course, so placements depends on our talent but not on the college. The average salary offered is Rs. 50,000 per month and the maximum salary offered is up to 2 lacs per month. As it is a professional course, none of the companies visited here for our course. Top roles offered to the students in dentistry are endodontist, prosthodontics, periodontology, pedodontist, oral pathologist, oral maxillofacial surgeon, etc. In our course, the lowest salary offered is Rs. 50,000 per month and the highest salary offered is 3 lacs per month. About 100 students of the students got an internship every year.

reviews_list.batch_info: BDS - Bachelor of Dental Surgery - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: Gsl dental college review.

review_content.Placements: There will be no placement since we are training to become dentist but once we graduate we can open our own clinic or continue higher studies by writing NEET PG for doing their specialisation in their desired branch which will help them to get better experience and skills.
review_content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is the best in the surrounding areas with a huge library known as green library and the gallaries and auditoriums are modern. The hostel facility is good fee structure depends on the type of accommodation we choose and the mess is okay the junior and senior are seperate floor.

individual_reviews.course: BDS - Bachelor of Dental Surgery - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: Satisfied with the education but the fees are a little bit higher.

content.Placements: A hundred percent of students were placed in the college. Since it's a dental college don't expect any placements as such. Everybody gets to do an internship in the college itself. The roles offered in the college would be dental both graduation and post-graduation.
content.Infrastructure: We have a Wi-Fi facility and different clinical areas for all nine departments. We have a library and all the books. The quality of the hostel is good but the price is very high for the hostel. Food is average. We have a good canteen area. Sports we do very well.

individual_reviews.course: BDS - Bachelor of Dental Surgery - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: There is a good and friendly principal.

content.Placements: Every year about 100 students will join our college. After passing out of college, we will get the lowest salary of Rs. 10,000 per month. The highest salary depends on our experience. We can join as interns in private hospitals as we get a stipend. We have a career n oral and maxillofacial surgery and orthodontics.
content.Infrastructure: There is Wi-Fi and a huge library that is open 24x7. The food served here is good, but a little expensive. Sports are the main priority here. There are clinical labs daily for us, where we deal with patients, and even our seniors will help.
