reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Physiotherapy - Batch of 2020
reviews_list.review_title: It's the best college in Kolkata for physiotherapy.

review_content.Placements: Placements are not available, but still, it's the best college in Kolkata for studying physiotherapy. You will get to learn how to handle different types of patients. The faculty and the infrastructure of the college are too good. Faculty members are too frank, supportive, helpful, caring, and good in nature.
review_content.Infrastructure: Every room has AC. It also has a library, medical facility and clinic, labs. Food provided by the canteen is awesome, but it only provides vegetarian food, it is good news for vegetarians but bad news for non-vegetarians. The hostel rooms are also good. Everything is good, and I didn't face any problem during my college life. We have sports events annually, students from 3rd year onwards get the clinical knowledge.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Physiotherapy - Batch of 2014
reviews_list.review_title: NIHS is the best in Kolkata for physiotherapy.

review_content.Placements: NIHS is the first private physiotherapy college of Kolkata. Our college had a good placement cell. They organise campus interviews in the leading healthcare companies from time to time. NIHS provides 100% placement assistant to all the students who have successfully completed their course.
review_content.Infrastructure: NIHS is the first private physiotherapy college of Kolkata having great committing options. It is at a walkable distance from Kolkata's historical environment friendly metro railway (Girish Park). NIHS has a good ambience for study as its classrooms are fully soundproof and air-conditioned. Library has rich source of books and journals and the online digital library makes it different from other colleges.

reviews.review_text: Every kind of facility is provided in our college. Infrastructure is also good and we have Wi-Fi, lab, library and many more facilities. The hostel is quite okay and food is also good. Mess provides proper meal at decent price and many more. Events are held too.

reviews.review_heading: It's the best college in Kolkata for physiotherapy.
reviews.review_text: Every room has AC. It also has a library, medical facility and clinic, labs. Food provided by the canteen is awesome, but it only provides vegetarian food, it is good news for vegetarians but bad news for non-vegetarians. The hostel rooms are also good. Everything is good, and I didn't face any problem during my college life. We have sports events annually, students from 3rd year onwards get the clinical knowledge.

reviews.review_heading: NIHS is the best in Kolkata for physiotherapy.
reviews.review_text: NIHS is the first private physiotherapy college of Kolkata having great committing options. It is at a walkable distance from Kolkata's historical environment friendly metro railway (Girish Park). NIHS has a good ambience for study as its classrooms are fully soundproof and air-conditioned. Library has rich source of books and journals and the online digital library makes it different from other colleges.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with the faculty teaching and the studying materials.
reviews.review_text: There is no hostel at my college. Faculty members are absolutely amazing with remarkable teaching strategies. Wi-Fi is available on every floor, and the library is open during college hours. There is an intra-college competition where students from all years are mixed and grouped for various competitions.

reviews_list.review_title: This is a rising new government college.

review_content.Placements: This is a Government Medical College, so the faculty is obviously very good. And after all, the placements are given by the state government. This is also good till now. So, you can come for admission without hesitating. As it is a new college, there are some cons but are minor.
review_content.Infrastructure: All the departments are newly organized. College campus is new. So, everything is very clean and okay. Hostel is also a brand new. There is no objection about the hostel rooms. There is Wi-Fi connection for the students in the academic building, but in hostel, it's personal.

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: I am satisfied because there is an excellent atmosphere, good infrastructure and facilities.

review_content.Placements: In our college, admission is 100% per year. Out of them, 85% are from state quota and rest 15% are from all India quota (aiq). Great scope of patient variety. Being the only super speciality hospital in the district of Uttar Dinajpur, it has a huge patient load, which is very helpful for interns to practice. Being a new college has a great scope for making it better.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our college provided air-conditioned classes with a huge capacity. Each and every lecture theatre has a projector on which digital classes are taken. Separate laboratories for each and every department. A central library is present, along with an internet room with free Wi-Fi. Hostel fee is Rs. 12 per month. There are big enough rooms with 3 students in a room where everyone is provided with a personal B.Ed table, chair and mattress. Running water is available 24X7. There is a mess available. You can play outdoor games like cricket, football and kabaddi. Indoor games like badminton, table tennis, carrom, etc. All departments of MBBS are available.

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2030
reviews_list.review_title: Satisfying environment filled with great positivity.

review_content.Placements: More than 80 percent of the students got placed. The top roles offered are a doctor in a hospital and a nursing home. More than 85 percent of students got an internship from our course. The highest package may be 24 LPA & the lowest may be 8.5 LPA.
review_content.Infrastructure: There is Wi-Fi, labs available for each department & well-organized classrooms & helpful libraries. The food quality is good & there are some extra stalls besides the academic canteen, where students can buy food at reasonable prices. Medical facilities are also good, along with sports facilities.

college_info.college_name: UNOM - University of Madras, Taramani Campus

highlights.summary:
University of Madras (UNOM), Taramani Campus was established in 1857. It has been accredited by National Assessment and Accreditation Council (NAAC) with an A rating. The University imparts both UG and PG Education through the affiliated institutions which are spread over the districts of Chennai, Thiruvallur and Kancheepuram. Apart from teaching, research activities in Arts, Humanities, Science, Management and Technology shape the academic tenor of the University.

The university has five campuses: Chepauk Campus, Marina Campus, Guindy Campus, Taramani Campus and Maduravoyal Campus. The 68 University Departments of study and research are spread over five campuses organised into 18 Schools each of which offer PG Courses in respective specialisation, part time and full time PhD Programmes, Diploma and Certificate Programmes.

Sekkizhar (Taramani) Campus has two schools: School of Basic Medical Sciences and School of Nano Science and Photonics. School of Basic Medical Sciences has eight departments: Anatomy, Medical Biochemistry, Endocrinology, Genetics, Microbiology, Pathology, Pharmacology and Environmental Toxicology and Physiology. School of Nano Science and Photonics has two departments: National Centre for Ultrafast Processes and Centre for Nanosciences and Nanotechnology.

Here are the admission details of courses offered by UNOM, Taramani Campus are:

UNOM, Taramani Campus offers several PG courses in various specialisations. The details of some of the courses are as follows:

Check out details on UNOM, Taramani Campus Courses

UNOM, Taramani Campus offers scholarship: Madras University Free Education Scheme (MUFES) 2017-18 to students who are unable to pursue their higher education in undergraduate courses in the aided/ self-financed colleges only affiliated to University of Madras, owing to financial constraint (Tuition fee and Hostel fee only).

Check out details on UNOM, Taramani Campus Scholarships

Check out details on UNOM, Taramani Campus Placements

fees_and_eligibility.overview: UNOM - University of Madras, Taramani Campus offers various programmes at PG level. Students can choose Full Time courses from plethora of streams such as Engineering, Medicine & Health Sciences and Humanities & Social Sciences. At the PG level, students can choose from courses, namely M.E./M.Tech, M.Sc. and M.A. The fees for UNOM - University of Madras, Taramani Campus courses range between INR 3,000 to 1,00,000.

reviews_list.batch_info: M.Sc. in Biomedical Genetics - Batch of 2023
reviews_list.review_title: Overall, the best university for M.Sc. in Biomedical Genetics Course.

review_content.Placements: A good percentage of students were placed in our study. About 70% students got placed. The highest package is 19 LPA and the lowest is 4 LPA. The top hiring companies are Zifo, Eli Lilly, LabCorp, Biocon, Medgenome, etc. The percentage of students selected for internship is 85%. Genetic Counselor, Bioinformatics Scientist and high-quality roles are provided.
review_content.Infrastructure: Advanced labs and first-rate classrooms and a guesthouse were provided. The hostel's food was excellent, and as day scholars, we were able to purchase a coupon and eat there. I used to attend on Thursdays because of the unique meals. We have large fields for football and cricket.

individual_reviews.title: Overall, the best university for M.Sc. in Biomedical Genetics Course.

content.Placements: A good percentage of students were placed in our study. About 70% students got placed. The highest package is 19 LPA and the lowest is 4 LPA. The top hiring companies are Zifo, Eli Lilly, LabCorp, Biocon, Medgenome, etc. The percentage of students selected for internship is 85%. Genetic Counselor, Bioinformatics Scientist and high-quality roles are provided.
content.Infrastructure: Advanced labs and first-rate classrooms and a guesthouse were provided. The hostel's food was excellent, and as day scholars, we were able to purchase a coupon and eat there. I used to attend on Thursdays because of the unique meals. We have large fields for football and cricket.

paragraphs: University of Madras, Taramani has not released its official placement report, however, the NIRF report for 2025 has been released. As per the NIRF report 2025, 483 (PG 2-year) students secured placements. Their median package for courses such as MA stood at INR 4.20 LPA , which was 12.5% more than the median package in 2023.

In (PG 3-year) 7 students got placements, the number of students placed in 2024 was one-third of the number of students placed in 2023. This marks a decline in number of students placed by 66.66% . the median package for PG 3-year courses like MSc was recorded at INR 4.80 LPA. during University of Madras, Taramani placements 2024

highlights.summary:
The JEE Main 2026 registration for session 2 has closed for A.R. College of Pharmacy and G.H. Patel Institute of Pharmacy admission to BTech, BArch and BPlan courses. The session 2 exams will be conducted from Apr 2 to Apr 9, 2026.

Here are some additional updates regarding the A.R. College of Pharmacy and G.H. Patel Institute of Pharmacy:

fees_and_eligibility.overview: A.R. College of Pharmacy and G.H. Patel Institute of Pharmacy provides Full Time programs at the UG and PG levels. These courses are available in stream like Medicine & Health Sciences, and have a fee structure of around INR 2,200 to 3,16,000. UG programs include B.Pharma and D.Pharma. Further, the PG programs include M.Pharma.

faqs.answer: A:    A.R. College of Pharmacy and G.H. Patel Institute of Pharmacy offers various courses like Ph.D, D.Pharma, B.Pharma, M.Pharma in Medicine & Health Sciences stream. A.R. College of Pharmacy and G.H. Patel Institute of Pharmacy has specializations such as Pharmaceutical, Pharmacognosy, Pharmacy Practice, Pharmacology, Quality Assurance .
faqs.question: Which specializations can I find in the programs offered at A.R. College of Pharmacy and G.H. Patel Institute of Pharmacy?

faqs.answer: A:    The seats availability for offered courses at A.R. College of Pharmacy and G.H. Patel Institute of Pharmacy goes up to 214. Courses offerred by A.R. College of Pharmacy and G.H. Patel Institute of Pharmacy are approved by eminent Government bodies such as PCI, AICTE.
faqs.question: How many seats are available for various courses offered at A.R. College of Pharmacy and G.H. Patel Institute of Pharmacy?

review_content.Placements: AR college of pharmacy provides 100 percent placement but the package received by students is not great. Package ranges between 15-25k per month. Top recruiting companies are sunpharma, alembic and zydus. Students do not get direct internship from college but the college provides assistance to the students for internship. After completing B.Pharma, one can go for higher studies, work as drug inspector or various roles in industry and can open a community pharmacy.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college has all the lab facilities and the machines require to perform practicals. Labs are well furnished and the conditions of classrooms are also fine. College has one library with more than 10,000 books in inventory but all are related to Pharma field only. Wi-Fi facilities are provided but the speed is poor. Hostel facilities is provided by college for both boys and girls. Mess facilities is provided only to the girls and boys have to go to private messes to eat. No sports and medical facilities are provided for both boys and girls in hostel.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: Our college offers the best courses in pharmacy.

review_content.Placements: Most of the students in our college are good at studies and they are all eligible for an internship. The minimum percentage required for an internship is above 60%. We have practical knowledge of the subject just because our college performed all the practicals and teaches about pr very well.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our college provides all the facilities for students, staff, and gardens, as well as sports activities. For a long-distance student college, having its own hostels for girls and boys, both stay there with a minimal amount. They also have good infrastructure and safety instruments like fire bridge and the best canteen too. They provide all the sports instruments.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2018
reviews_list.review_title: This college provides good infrastructure and has good facilities for laboratory.

review_content.Placements: There were two types of quotes in our college government as well as self-finance. For government quotas require high marks and self-finance also requires high marks. The average salary package offered was 2.2 LPA. Cadila, Zyudus, etc., were the top recruiting companies.
review_content.Infrastructure: In this college, the laboratory was good and the infrastructure was also good. The hostel facilities were available only for living, but the food was not good. The hostel fee was Rs 17,000 per year for boys. The canteen was available behind this college. The classes were well established with a projector and board.

paragraphs: Admission at A.R. College of Pharmacy and G.H. Patel Institute of Pharmacy are both merit and entrance-based as per the course. Students are offered programmes at UG, PG and Doctorate level. These courses are offered in full time mode. To get admission inA.R. College of Pharmacy and G.H. Patel Institute of Pharmacy, students must meet the eligibility. The applications are accepted online. Some of the accepted entrance tests include NEET, ACPC Admission, and GPAT, and more. For merit-based admissions, scores in last qualifying exam are the criteria. See below more insights on admissions forA.R. College of Pharmacy and G.H. Patel Institute of Pharmacy courses:

faqs.question: How many seats are available for various courses offered at A.R. College of Pharmacy and G.H. Patel Institute of Pharmacy?
faqs.answer: The seats availability for offered courses at A.R. College of Pharmacy and G.H. Patel Institute of Pharmacy goes up to 214. Courses offerred by A.R. College of Pharmacy and G.H. Patel Institute of Pharmacy are approved by eminent Government bodies such as PCI, AICTE.

hostel_campus.college_name: A.R. College of Pharmacy and G.H. Patel Institute of Pharmacy Infrastructure Details & Reviews

hostel.description: The institute has separate hostel for boys and girls with a total capacity of 113 beds.
The institute has separate hostel for boys and girls with a total capacity of 113 beds.

reviews.review_heading: A great place for shaping your future in pharmacy field.
reviews.review_text: The college has all the lab facilities and the machines require to perform practicals. Labs are well furnished and the conditions of classrooms are also fine. College has one library with more than 10,000 books in inventory but all are related to Pharma field only. Wi-Fi facilities are provided but the speed is poor. Hostel facilities is provided by college for both boys and girls. Mess facilities is provided only to the girls and boys have to go to private messes to eat. No sports and medical f...

reviews.review_heading: Our college offers the best courses in pharmacy.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides all the facilities for students, staff, and gardens, as well as sports activities. For a long-distance student college, having its own hostels for girls and boys, both stay there with a minimal amount. They also have good infrastructure and safety instruments like fire bridge and the best canteen too. They provide all the sports instruments.

reviews.review_heading: This college provides good infrastructure and has good facilities for laboratory.
reviews.review_text: In this college, the laboratory was good and the infrastructure was also good. The hostel facilities were available only for living, but the food was not good. The hostel fee was Rs 17,000 per year for boys. The canteen was available behind this college. The classes were well established with a projector and board.
